title: 未 trust の workspace でも sandbox.enabled は生きる -> cwd 内 Bash 書込は auto-allow ✅ / cwd 外は EPERM ❌。sandbox は trust ゲート対象外(allowWrite は要検証)

probes.prompt: Run exactly this one bash command using the Bash tool: echo data > inside.txt — just run it, no commentary, no alternatives. If it is blocked, do not try any other tool; just report the result.

Run exactly this one bash command using the Bash tool: echo data > $HOME/lab-untrust-probe/probe.txt — just run it, no commentary, no alternatives. If it is blocked, do not try any other tool; just report the result.
probes.result_text: The command was blocked: `operation not permitted: $HOME/lab-untrust-probe/probe.txt`

probes.prompt: Run exactly this one bash command using the Bash tool: echo data > $HOME/lab-untrust-allowed/probe.txt — just run it, no commentary, no alternatives. If it is blocked, do not try any other tool; just report the result.

hypothesis: sandbox.enabled と sandbox.filesystem.allowWrite は workspace trust のゲート対象外(trust が縛るのは permissions.allow と additionalDirectories のみ)。ゆえに未 trust の workspace でも sandbox は有効なまま: cwd 内 Bash 書込は auto-allow で ✅、cwd 外の非 allowlist は EPERM で ❌、allowWrite 列挙先は ✅。= worker の trust 注入が失敗しても OS 境界は落ちない(defense-in-depth)。もし probe 1 が ❌(sandbox off)なら仮説を棄却し『sandbox は trust に依存する』という重大リスクとして記録する。
